name: BEN_CRT_ORDR_F
description: BEN_CRT_ORDR_F identifies orders issued by legislative bodies for a person and a plan or a plan type. A person may have multiple orders for the same plan covering different related persons.

columns.Name: CRT_ORDR_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: CRT_ORDR_TYP_CD
columns.Comments: This column indicates Court order type.

columns.Name: CRT_ORDR_STAT_CD
columns.Comments: Court order status to determine if it is to be enforced or not.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ORDR_END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates Court Order ending date.

columns.Name: ORDR_START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates  Court order starting date.

columns.Name: CRT_IDENT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Court order identifier.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Description.

columns.Name: DETD_QLFD_ORDR_DT
columns.Comments: Determined qualified court order date.

columns.Name: ISSUE_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Issue date.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: RCVD_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Received Date.

columns.Name: CRT_ISSNG
columns.Comments: This column indicates Issuing Court.

columns.Name: ELIGIBLE_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Eligible Date.

columns.Name: PASSD_FIN_ASSMNT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Passed Financial assessment.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
columns.Comments: This column indicates First line of address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_2
columns.Comments: This column indicates Second line of address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_3
columns.Comments: This column indicates Third line of address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_4
columns.Comments: This column indicates Fourth line of address.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: This column indicates Country of the address.

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: This column indicates Postal code of the address.

columns.Name: CITY
columns.Comments: This column indicates City of the address.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates State of the address.

columns.Name: NOTES
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Notes.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
